→ THE STORY

Ever since, Vincent vowed not to mess with a man like that. Not just because of the chance of being fired and blacklisted, but also since his status is something Vincent can not overpower yet.

It seems the idea of messing with Morgan or getting close to his heir intimidates him, going so far as to admit he'd quit. As he started to persuade for another round, he found your ID on the ground, intending to pick it up for you.
